text: Elon Musk announced that Tesla will open a new Gigafactory in Austin, Texas on March 22, 2024, creating over 5,000 manufacturing jobs and boosting the local economy.
Cristiano Ronaldo scored a hat-trick for Al Nassr against Al Hilal on Saturday at the King Fahd Stadium in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, bringing his total to 900 career goals.
Tim Cook unveiled the new Apple Vision Pro at the Worldwide Developers Conference in Cupertino, California on June 5, 2023, marking Apple's entry into spatial computing.
Scientists at CERN in Geneva, Switzerland confirmed the detection of a new subatomic particle on July 4, 2012, collaborating with researchers from MIT and Stanford University.
Jamie Dimon, CEO of JPMorgan Chase, testified before the Senate Banking Committee in Washington D.C. on September 22, 2023 about risks in the financial sector.
Sam Altman returned as CEO of OpenAI in San Francisco on November 22, 2023 after a brief ousting by the board, backed by Microsoft and the majority of the company's employees.
Director Steven Spielberg received the American Film Institute Lifetime Achievement Award in Hollywood on June 9, 2023 for his contributions to Universal Pictures and cinema.
UN Secretary-General António Guterres urged world leaders at the COP28 summit in Dubai, UAE on December 1, 2023 to accelerate commitments under the Paris Agreement.
Doctors at the Mayo Clinic in Rochester, Minnesota published groundbreaking research on Alzheimer's disease in The Lancet on February 14, 2024.
Amazon founder Jeff Bezos and his partner Lauren Sánchez donated $100 million to the Obama Foundation in Chicago, Illinois on November 15, 2023.
